name: Prometheus Ash & Archive Style
description: Prometheus house-style playbook for using archival, industrial, dossier, mythic-operational visual language in promos, HyperFrames videos, UI art direction, and brand surfaces.

resources.description: Style extraction from the Polsia/Bencera reference video and how to adapt it for Prometheus without copying it.
Canonical Ash & Archive palette tokens for Prometheus creative work.
Pre-authoring brief for Ash & Archive HyperFrames videos.
